series_metadata.series_description: Records include correspondence, inspection reports, complaint reports, Warning Letters, Notices of Deficiency, Notices of Violation, Emergency Orders, Consent Orders, Judgement Decrees, Summary Judgements, penalty assessments and penalty correspondence, hearing transcripts, and associated supporting documents.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Keep unless a licensee or permittee is involved in litigation with Division, in which case records will be kept two years all administrative, civil or criminal action is complete. ; Electronic: Keep unless a licensee or permittee is involved in litigation with Division, in which case records will be kept two years all administrative, civil or criminal action is complete
